title: epidendrum prostratum
intro: Epidendrum prostratum, also known as the prostrate orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum prostratum include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
